# AI Identity — llms.txt
# https://ai-identity.co

## About
AI Identity is an identity infrastructure platform for autonomous AI agents. It provides per-agent API keys, scoped permissions, policy-as-code enforcement, and tamper-proof cryptographic audit trails, enabling enterprise teams to govern AI agents at scale and comply with SOC 2, EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF, and GDPR requirements.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://www.ai-identity.co/
- How It Works: https://www.ai-identity.co/how-it-works
- Security: https://www.ai-identity.co/security
- Architecture: https://www.ai-identity.co/architecture
- Pricing: https://www.ai-identity.co/pricing
- EU AI Act Checklist: https://www.ai-identity.co/eu-ai-act-checklist
- Integrations: https://www.ai-identity.co/integrations
- Documentation: https://www.ai-identity.co/docs
- Blog: https://www.ai-identity.co/blog

## Core Features
- Per-agent API keys (aid_sk_ prefix) with scoped permissions (read-only, write, admin, custom)
- HMAC-SHA256 hash-chained tamper-proof audit trails
- Policy-as-code enforcement at the gateway layer
- Chain-of-thought forensic replay for incident investigation
- Compliance dashboards for SOC 2 Type II, EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF, and GDPR
- Human-in-the-loop approval gates for high-risk actions
- Real-time anomaly detection for out-of-scope agent behavior
- AES-256 encrypted credential vault — agents never see raw provider keys
- Sub-50ms gateway overhead per request
- Drop-in integration: change one URL (base_url), no SDK lock-in

## Pricing
- Free: $0/mo for up to 5 agents
- Pro: $79/mo for up to 50 agents
- Business: $299/mo for up to 200 agents
- Enterprise: Custom pricing for unlimited agents

- Founded: 2026
- Founder: Jeff Leva
